results.rendered_html:
aśatru (3. a + śatru)
1〉 adj.
a〉 der keinen (ebenbürtigen) Gegner hat, dem Niemand trotzt: aśatrurindra januṣā sanādasi  ṚV. 1,102,8 . 10,28,6 . 133,2 .
— b〉 nicht trotzend, wehrlos: aśatrva1 ryaḥ samajāti vedaḥ  ṚV. 5,2,12 .
— 2〉 m. Mond  ŚABDAC. _im_ ŚKDR. 
— 3〉 n. Feindlosigkeit: aśatrvindro abhayaṃ naḥ kṛṇotu  AV. 6,40,2 .

results.rendered_html:
aśatru a.
1 One who has no enemy.
2 One whom no enemy defies or challenges.
3 Without opposition from foes.
— tru n. The condition of having no enemies.
— truḥ The moon.
